textPlain: LLMs are the first technology I've experienced where there's a lot of top-down pressure to adopt it ASAP. Most other technologies in my career, like VCS or static analysis or whatever else were championed by colleagues or peers.
> All participants are completely anonymised for their privacy and protectionHaving to do this says a lot about how fragile the state of AI/LLM hype.
Forced or not, there’s observable slop in documentation and specs in my company’s Confluence.
